creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Maybe the maintainer just didn't have time to look into it yet :)
Best thing when that happens is to look into it yourself.

Btw, the problem does not exist on 12.0-CURRENT with linux-sublime3-3.1.26_1.

More information is necessary from your side.  What FreeBSD version are you on? What package version are you using?  Have you ktrace'd and kdump'ed sublime to maybe find out what the problem could be?
